star_1.text: It's setup for impossible. You can only place what it gives to you. It gives you something that you don't need. It takes forever to kill a simple soldier. Gun's used are a joke. Kicks you out of the game, forcing you to have to go back in. It's not worth the headache. It's not possible to advance without buying. There are tons of better games out there than this one. Takes way too long to level up your fortress. U only get 90 days to complete, yet you can only collect when the timer says. BS!!

Money grab. Difficulty curve & timer on chests make it so you can't progress without spending real money, or repeating the same levels for days at a time. Even watching endless ads doesn't help. Game is "technically" free to play, but it's absolutely pay to win. Uninstalled very quickly. Edit: gave this game another chance and reinstalled. No change. Cannot pass level 10 without spending real money. Scummy unethical design.

this was a good game and it only plays 1 ad at the end (I'm REALLY sick of ads) of the 40 waves. biggest problems, you lose more games than you win because the game cheats. it'll set you up with defensive weapons at the start of the fight, then it starts giving you things you don't need that much. when you need more defensive weapons, it gives you road extensions, upgrades, etc. and your headquarters doesn't repair that fast either. you lose more HQ points than gain. I uninstalled it.

worst game ever! The game play is actually fun but the company that runs it is a complete waste of space. they never fix anything. I get you must have adds to make money but when every add crashes your game and you must watch the same reward video 10 times to get a single reward it's not worth it. this company does not care about its customers but rather just the money and nothing else. this is a waste of time do not play this!

Shop prices are outrageously high, in-game offers are ridiculous, and a monthly subscription starting at $16 to turn off all ads. The gameplay is still fun though, and you can at least turn off the forced ads for as low as $3 -$4 to get uninterupted gameplay as long as you don't get any ad rewards like being allowed to trash a chest you don't want. Update: I just learned that the "Legendary Pass" for $20 does not include the items from the "Epic Pass." Hyper predatory practices everywhere here.

just started playing the game for real. if I get one more ad when I choose an option that doesn't say 'play ad', I'll delete. there's options that say 'ad' and others don't. you should hope, I guess, that doesn't happen again. deleted. I redownloaded because it is a fun game. but what if I download one of these ads and play it way more than your game? 🤔

The game is great. Awesome gameplay, and fun. It's very addicting! But, the about of "ads" is quite ridiculous. They didn't have a lot at first. But after a bit of gameplay the ads come ALL THE TIME. It's at every turn and every power-up. It is horrible the amount of ads they have. Completely ruins the game.

The game is cool but it's become unplayable. A wifi logo with an exclamation point keeps popping up and slowing the game down. I suppose it means no wifi but I'm sitting next to my ho.e router AND I have mobile data turned on. No other games or services on my phone struggle the way this game does. I think it's a bug or something. Maybe they can fix it?

Latest update added many more forced ads and the logic on the game gets ridiculous. You will have the perfect build and your strategy is killing everything, and then in one wave, everything walks through and completely drains all your power. Max upgrades, the perfect equipment to kill each enemy, and they just laugh and drain everything while my six towers are shooting exclusively at them. If you're looking to see a bunch of ads and make no progress, this is your game.

Very fun. Removed forced ads for a dollar. I don't care about the gems or points or whatever. But the gameplay is very fun. Cheap, very appreciative of the low price. Edit: Too greedy, it's annoying. I don't want subscriptions, I just want to play a game while the world turns to poop around me. Add it to the Google Play Pass and stop putting everything behind ads or subs. Just make a game. "We need to use ads because ___" Nope! You just want more!

PREDATORY ADS! iknow games use ads to make money because they're free, and I agree with that. this game is on another level with ads. everything you click on is an ad. you get ads as you are playing the game. I wouldnt mind any of that but this is why I hate it....the ads are the ones that trick you into clicking the wrong spot so it takes you to the app store, you have to back out several times, they change the location of the skip, it opens apps you have to close, etc etc. terrible dont do it

keep nerfing free to play aspects. its a real shame Edit - due to the reply the game is free to download, however there were a few features that actually went from a reasonable and satisfying grind to "please pay money every event if you want to make progress in the next 2 years" I don't want to purchase heros because not only are they expensive, they're also useless without continuously paying for events because you can't get the currency to level them at a decent rate.

I'll admit, I played this a lot and didn't care for the large amount of ads. My problem is, it doesn't save your account. if you play this game a lot, get a new phone, your account is lost. no option for signing in. even if your Google account is on your new phone. so all the time and possible money you spent for upgrades in the game, gone forever.

It's a very fun game and requires strategic thinking to clear levels. But the difficulty spike early on and the asinine amount of unskippable ads makes it very hard to enjoy. And after a recent update there are now ads mid map too. It's almost unplayable now. Other games let you buy a one time pass that gets rid of ads permanently but this game makes you buy a monthly subscription to skip ads and it's very expensive.

game is pretty fun for the most part, but I think more than that is actually more frustrating. part of the reason that I have continued to play up to this point is because it is kind of addicting. but I've had more frustrating moments with this game because of how impossible they make certain rounds and the end goal is for you to keep playing ads so that you keep getting coins and other similar things to advance your army. I don't know how many ads I've seen already, it's ridiculous. never again

A strategy game where the player's ability to form strategies is replaced with a 3 card RNG system. So your ability to control what you build is limited to whats on the cards. Makes no sense to do this when there's a combat triangle. How am I supposed to exploit weaknesses when everything I build is random? Really bad game design and too difficult to enjoy. Enemies just fly over your defenses and the flying ones have way too much HP to kill quickly. Very frustrating game

I had this game at a five star, but once you reach a certain level, not only do you get ads after every single match, but you literally get spammed with pop-up ads in the middle of your game. this is total garbage and the game is unplayable. I just had a 30 wave match and literally got at least a dozen ads middle of the game. The line needs drawn somewhere and I thought it was Overkill once you have to start watching ads at the end of every single match, but they just keep adding ads everywhere

I've got 180+ consecutive days on this game. Grinding through, paid no money. I was good with the advertisement structure initially. Play and AD after a match, fine. Get extra gems and coins, fine. Now they updated and it's triple the advertising. They play an AD at the bottom of the screen during a match now. Instead of watching 1 AD to get 30 extra gems like before now its 4 ADs for 120 gems. Now it interrupts a match to play an advertisement. I'm out.

Ads are everywhere. I get it, it's income. Complete a level - watch an ad. Need a new life - watch an ad. That's acceptable. But with a recent update, you now get ads in the middle of game play - a jarring interruption while you are playing. This is not acceptable! Consider this game uninstalled. Based on your reply, you obviously don't get it. I'm fine with ads at the end of a level. I understand the business model. But in the middle of a game, pass.

I felt grimey playing this. It's a LITERAL 'PAY TO WIN' EACH LEVEL type game. each time you level up, you get to pick between 3 "random" upgrades (tower, tower upgrade, road, etc). Except you'll keep getting roads! Don't worry though, you can pay $ for refreshes, if you dont youll lose. Then they bombard you with more things you should pay for after each level. Even the ads are sketchy and force you to open play store to close them. DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME!

star_2.text: No good options, pay for it. No Most games are easy, and get harder nope, full on hard. No chance to level up real time, spend all on the first 20 waves ten min of play. With dumb options that don't modify anything but take up space needed desperately. Guns that never fire till close For the 15+ years I've played, and wrote about in mobile games this is a bad design for an engineer like me, to put up with, get better, or get lost. To little, to late. Constant download. Go elsewhere.

The game starts off fun, but progression eventually becomes impossible without spending money. I’ve reached a stage where my towers barely do any damage, making normal gameplay pointless. At this point, the only option is grinding events over and over. It feels pay-to-win, which is disappointing. I’ll be uninstalling.

game is fun,but the deception used to try and extract money is shameful. For example, I can watch an add to get a retry at defeating a level, yet somehow after spending 45 minutes to get to the last wave of a level, the boss demolishes me, which is fine it's a boss. but mysteriously the ads aren't available for me to get the retry. The button is there, I click it, then a message pops up saying ads aren't ready. I've been playing for an hour. but I am offered a retry for 4.99. total bs

Incredibly fun for a while. I played for months, upgrading everything as I went. But it hit a point where all I did was grind, and never won a challenge to upgrade my base. I'd spend a week, then two, then three just grinding every single night: lose, lose, lose in matches to get chests to upgrade, spend in game points to upgrade, and my cards never did make it to level, my hero never made it to my level...and every level I got, the harder every single challenge got. It becomes pay to play.

Solid potential, but is ultimately a terrible experience due to aggressive ads. I understand that ads are needed in order to generate additional revenue, but this is ridiculous. They're far too frequent and lengthy. Players can receive additional rewards for volunteering to watch some of the ads (most are imposed), but this is not entirely optional if you want to succeed. Stages are designed for players to lose, and only have a chance of continuing if lengthy ads are watched. Don't recommend.

I enjoyed playing this game for a long time. with the new update, you jave ads every 5 minutes. It makes playing annoying because the ad will just pop up in the middle of the round. I know you gotta make money, but you still had to watch ads to get extra lives and other items. I wish I could give this game 5 stars, but I can't.

This was a good little game killed by greed. Seems like each update just increases the amount of ads. Ads for bonus items? Expected. Ads between levels? Sure why not, it's a good game. Banner ads while playing? I guess, if you have to. Random pop-in ads while trying to play? Nah, thanks, the game isn't that good. Second star only because it was a fun game once upon a time.

Frankly, it was awesome. Then as of today, it upped the amount of ads ten fold. They now pop up right in the middle of games, and not how it used to be where it was mainly to get some benefits like extra tower cards and such. They had already started giving them to me at the end of every game, which was annoying enough. Uninstalling. Trash money grab.

it's ok, I mean the game play itself is fun. but it is totally designed to MAKE You spend money. you can only progress buy buying packs. and the amount of ads you MUST watch and endure in order to get what little hand outs they want to give you is ridiculous. Also here lately they have bugged the ads so you can't even get your "free" stuff. it says trouble loading and support blames the connection. I'm wifi at home so that's not an issue!

too many technical difficulties! wifi issues completely kills the fun. it'll have issues connecting but the enemies are still moving and attacking you but there's nothing you can do. wifi or data, it's saying I have messed up connection. not fun to restart, not fun to not be able to use power ups. I'm also here from a game tester app and lost my speed bonus due to technical difficulties...this game has potential, but the bugs are gonna kill it....

it's ok. you can never get the towers that you need to defend your base when you need them. example, I needed air support towers to defend my base against air only enemies. for 4 matches in a row I didn't get one air defense tower to defend the air enemies. most frustrating experience. if you want to get frustrated, please download this game. if not, I would pass.

Too many ads! It was ok when an ad came in after each round and if you wanted an extra card, but when they started putting a banner at the bottom of the game while you were playing plus 2 after each round it got a bit excessive. Then they started putting mid game play ads. That was the last straw. had to uninstall it. This came around level 16 or 17 and about 60 days of playing. Good game but way too many ads.

The gameplay itself is great. It almost nails the tower defence genre however as is the case with most mobile games, the company greed has taken over. Progressing becomes a painful slog after the beginning, with the "random" picks in the game almost adding an artificial level of difficulty i.e, you won't ever get an air defense tower on levels with high air unit counts. Furthermore the deck system adds so much to the game as opposed to other TD games, it's highly geared to p2w unfortunately.

this game starts off really fun, then quickly becomes a cash grab where you can't progress hardly at all without spending real money. download and play for a couple days then remove. that is about when they start putting ads after each round that require 4 clicks to get through. Anywho, was fun to play for a short bit while I had a broken finger. now it's deleted.

Way too hard to progress through without spending money, been stuck on the same level for over 4 weeks. It is a good game but takes way way way too long to progress, unless you spend your own money and LOTS of it. Also there's soooo many ads, DO NOT INSTALL unless you have a shed loads of money to spend and endless time to progress. MONEY GRABBING DEVELOPERS

instead of giving you options to get more towers or even upgrade, it just constantly gives you more path or map expansion unless you want to spend gems or real money for the CHANCE to get more towers or upgrades. Really annoying and luck based, but still kinda fun when you can actually get something that isn't more path. PLUS, if you try to use your special (missiles for example) and then the wave ends, you can't undo it and you waste it. super awful experience, all in all.

from most addictive to most annoying. After last udate commercials pop up not between plays, but during actual playing the game, when you're most focused on how to defeat the attackers. Also they want your money, how can I defeat incoming if you're not giving me towers? Just from useless options of broadening the buildable area and improving the power of the very few towers you givee me i can't get far. I'll play a few more days and if no changes, I'm done waisting time with this game.

Could be a great game if it didn't have so many adds, and the difficulty was more consistent. One minute I am doing well on a level then the next wave completely destroys me? I can see if it were a gradual change and I just didn't make it though. But to easily get through a wave only to completely crash and burn on the next? No thanks.

I just downloaded the game probably about an hour ago. so far I love the concept and the graphics I also love that the game is exactly what it says it is. I am finishing up my first level and it began to glitch. I'm going to start it over but it could be the fact that it's going through the mistPlay app UPDATE : game still freezes often. It also does not log points.

Good way to waste time and/or money. There are 2 main problems with this game: micro transactions & lack of strategic options. At least the game is playable for free, but it is compromised in all typical greedy ways to drive sales. I bought the starter pack to support the game and remove some ads, but the rest of the purchases are a complete waste of money. The fatal flaw for me is the lack of strategic control, particularly with path creation. It would be easy for the developers to fix, but ...

star_3.text: Addictive game. Graphics are great. Only bad thing isnt just the sheer amount of things to buy, but more so the price of them. Ranging from £2 all the way to £75. I just took some screenshots to share on this review, but it seems I can't. There are 12 screenshots of different pages full of things to buy, and I'm pretty sure there's more pages. I have emailed them telling them £12 for 50k coins is stupid as it takes 1.5 games to get that many coins! No reply as yet, but it is Christmas. Need wifi

fun game until you get to the slightly higher levels and they make it impossible to move on without spending money. also the ads start popping up like crazy randomly while you play. I'm good with watching ads at the end of a level or to speed something up, but randomly every few minutes is a little ridiculous. don't recommend this game for more than a few weeks.

Game is really fun. Devs have put a lot of effort into this. However, it had turned into a pretty big ad game, almost forcing you to buy the ads free option. I'm all for getting paid for your efforts, but getting an ad every minute? Watching an ad for a new deck shuffle, and the having another ad show before I can choose a card? getting a little ridiculous there.

I like this game! The tower defense is nice, but strategy is completely random. leveling is a bit slow, but ok. But the worst is the ads. Everyone complains about ads, but many of the ads in this game completely back you out and the game restarts. I spend more time either watching the ads or restarting the game. There is a level at which it is unplayable. If not for this, it would be a nice game.

I like the game and play it often. BUT!!! Game background operation checks the internet almost every second. As a result, the antenna image keeps popping up and the connection is cut off, making it impossible to progress in the game. At least when you start a stage, shouldn't it keep doing it? It's so annoying.

When I found this game I really liked it. Best tower defense game I have played. I really liked that ads were optional for extras and didn't really care about the time it took to open chests. However, last night's update put an ad at the end of every single game!!!!! It's not worth it to me anymore. I didn't mind the ads I watched, by choice, before. But now it's just too much. There's enough pay to play to not have these new ads. Another good game ruined...

Started out fun, but I'm uninstalling. I've spent way too much time with this game and gotten fairly far, but the further you get in the more frustrating it gets. Not only have the number of ads increased to the point of absurdity, but the offered upgrades keep getting more and more useless, to the point you can't get past certain levels because you can't get relevant equipment or skills. And no I'm not paying 10, 20, or even 50(!!l) to get what I need. I'm done.

Way to many ads now. Making the game unenjoybale and look cheap. little by little you keep adding ads. if you not making money figure out a better way to do it than ruining your game. You have 4 monthly subscription tiers. One use to be Gems and it took awhile to save up to but it was a way for people to get something for playing for free or spending money else where I your game. I have it on my old account I can't get back. As someone who enjoys the game and never writes reviews consider this.

It's a really fun game and the pacing isn't terrible for free to play. Unfortunately the ad walls have gotten really bad. I get a free game is going to have some ads and you have to watch an ad for a reset during a bout, but now they interrupt you during a game for no reason and you can't exit out of some of them. To the producers, you are leaning too hard into the ads. It's making the game unplayable

Its a fun game concept. With so many ads we have to watch, the levels should gradually increase in difficulty without sharp spikes. The 3 items available to pick from should allow the player a real opportunity to pass each level. Ads are frustrating enough and last too long for the amount of ads we have to watch only to barely survive half of the waves. Leveling up our items takes too long to keep pace with the sudden difficulty spikes. Ads equal revenue. So adjust the mechanics to compensate.

Good game/Too many adds. They just started making you watch ads every couple minutes just to play the game. I will watch ads to earn free rewards but i'm not watching your ads and making you money just to play the game for free. It's bad enough having to watch an ad after every match. Now they run an ad like every 3 mins plus after each match and to continue a match.

edit: once you have beaten a board you can go back and play it again, playing earlier boards can be fun - without ads and purchases. The graphics and gameplay are one of best tower defense games. OG: awful. it's all about in app purchases. zero chance of success without paying for it. ads everytime you fail and you will fail incredibly quickly if you haven't spent any money. don't bother. 👎👎

This game is pretty fun though each level can take a considerable amount of time, though if you leave out in the middle of a round the game will let you pick back up where you left off when you relaunch. The options for upgrade occur often but are random which leads to a lot of luck needed to win. The ads for me in this game at least are super buggy. I'd estimate about 35% of the ads I get either freeze entirely, or kick me out of the game which is especially annoying when they hit mid-round.

Fun game, but with flaws. Bosses linger at zero health until your base is destroyed, presumable to get you to watch an add to restore it. Well, I wish they'd just show me an ad at the end of the round instead of this nonsense. Also, you're at the mercy of the dice when it comes to what towers you get. Sometimes it's just more paths and more area extenders. This randomness makes it less fun than other tower games.

it's pretty good. Images look good, menu is organized. It reminds me of survivor.io. My main complaint is that it's more about random luck than skill. Each save, you're offered 3 supplies to choose from. But most of the time it's just more roadways or things that aren't useful. You can go through 10 waves without being offered any new weapons, which makes it impossible to win.

Super addictive game. Have spent actual money on this game and have been playing for a month or so. But the reason for only 3 stars is the way this game is programmed is extremely annoying. If it's not ready for you to win a level, it will not give you good options. Sometimes it will omit towers or paths all together. For example, if you need more air defense towers, they will feed you ground defense towers. If you need a straight piece of path, they will feed you towers. Very annoying!!!

Look it's pretty good, sound mechanics, it's just a little too RNG heavy to be consistently fun. It's difficult to describe but the game will lock you out of certain cards giving you garbage over and over again until you reach a certain round threshold. It gets really unfun and frustrating at times, and it mostly seems in service of making the game artificially more challenging to encourage in-app purchases. It's not the worst but I would only play it if you're into the sort of thing.

I rather enjoy this game but my biggest gripe is how this game fails its players... Timed chests with limited slots. I absolutely despise this mechanic in games. It guarantees that I'll play it maybe once or twice a day, if I remember to check back and open a chest. But that's it. No incentive to play once chest slots are full. As I said, worst mechanic ever for a game. But overall, the game itself is pretty good.

Ever since the update, some of the ads won't play, so the free revive doesn't work, and you can't get any of the bonuses for watching ads. Sometimes it says that ads are not available, and other times it will start to play, then stop, and go back to the game. Occasionally it will freeze up after that, or not give you the reward, and also not let you try to watch the video again.

Very RNG dependant. Whenever you level up, you get 3 options chosen at random from more road (no control over the path), random towers, tower upgrades, more field, or moving an already placed tower. You have no control over what 3, and the same option can show up multiple times, so the game can just decide you don't need new towers for 23 levels and you get no say. Topped off with a boss that can PERMANENTLY remove a 3×3 grid of towers when it shows up, and you get a very meh game experience.

star_4.text: Unable to log in with new device. online help is of no help. Game does not allow you to put in user ID and password. Forces you to painfully go through fist level and then you can't put in your old information to move to the new device. UPDATE. I found I had logged out of Facebook on my old phone and I needed to stay logged on to trigger my new phone to request the progress transfer. Support was actually quick at their reply.

I have spent a fair amount of time playing all sorts of tower defense games. This, by far, is my favorite. There are a lot of opportunities to earn the real money currency for free also. They do push tons of purchases on you constantly. I also have dealt with all sorts of different types of ads. This game is by far the worst. Now, granted, these adds are optional to gain extra currency or an extra life. But they seem longer than most with you having to click 2 or 3 times to close it.

Fun game but a bit too random at times. Need to be able to select your upgrades. When the enemies come up the path the upgrades come at you randomly. Maybe progression in the game should allow you to select this as an option with in-game currency rewards. Also some ads cause the game to restart about 10% of the time.. This can be rather annoying at times. the game does allow you to restart where you left off usually.

Overall, it is a decent TD game with a variety of towers, heroes, and skills to play. Devs clearly keep the game alive with numerous events. However, as many people pointed out, the game has too much RNG and too few strategic skills. Sometimes, your base will be quickly destroyed by flying units while you struggle to get a single anti-air turret in 26 consequtive waves. This is ridiculous and has to be fixed. The good side is that devs actually hear players and constantly improve the game.

great Tower Defense game, but in the end it depends on luck and what type of towers you'll get each round. sometimes you get lucky and get options to build just the right towers, roads, or upgrades, while other times you get the worst of the worst each round. this especially happens in PvP! really frustrating when you build only 2 things while your opponent is on the 4th or 5th! Great game overall, but this element of probability ruins it. skill turns into chance, even after you been playing for a long time and got the best upgrades.

This ia one of the more inspired tower defense games as it allows you to control the flow of combat in a sense. However, I have a few issues and suggestions to the devs. I strongly suggest you adjust the chances to get a tower based option when you level in game. It is ridiculous that we can go 8 levels (yes, 8, multiple times) without a single tower option or upgrade. No one needs that much track or that many area increases. Also, love the added chests to levels, but what about other options?

For me it's a very good game. A bit "kiddie" but the mechanics are exactly what I want. My only issue is how much spending is required to stay competitive which i hate in many greedy games. Otherwise the community is cool, devs respond and are active, game is quite interesting and challenging and i love upgrade system. But just the spending and honestly just having too much to do made me quit. I leave it for the younger folk.

It's a pretty fun game with a good concept. My biggest problem is the game seems to be against you in the later rounds. I rarely see any towers as options in the latter rounds but in the early game it throws them at you when you have no room to put them anywhere. I can't pick road options early because I don't know if I'm going to get towers later. Every time I play I end up being frustrated after one game when I can't get enough upgrades or towers to win.

Whilst trying to watch the videos/Ads to claim FREE REWARDS, the game has started to FORCE CLOSE and restart. This occurs when certain Ads redirect to GooglePlay. It's really annoying!!! Generally, I find this game enjoyable, if a little frustrating at times, and the graphics are very good. I find the cost of monthly passes and certain events to be to expensive on my current income but I am still enjoying this after more than a year of playing.

Game is a fun tower game. I've lost interest because it takes too long to play a round. I subscribed, so it went 4x speed. Unless you have unlimited time to play at 2x, you need to pay a monthly subscription. I did it but I don't think that is right. Even at 4x, the games are too long.

Good game, little to no ads (can watch one for revive and sometimes get a forced one after level complete/attempt). Variety of game modes (regular, challenge, PvP). Uninstalling as game becomes nearly impossible to clear a level after Reg.lvl 30 unless you're willing to spend money on gems for loot boxes for ridiculous prices. Character level 45 and Stage Level 31

Tower Defense games are my favorite brain rot distraction. While 2112TD is the best I have ever played, Raid Rush is the best one I have played for simplicity, balance, and expectations. Ads aren't over bearing, but it does take a bit to get used to the mechanics of how weapons are chosen and available to you in battle. I've had a few challenging levels, but never been outright stuck or felt I must buy anything. Gems and coins are offered daily and even losses are rewarded to keep engagement up

this is a good game, and I don't mind the difficulty level. I've been playing for about a year. My main issue is the lack of rewards for taking part in events, for example, the weekend events only give reward for the top 100, pls expand it to top 500. Additionally, I do spend money on this game but it feels pointless a lot of the time. Id suggest a VIP reward system for any money spent on the game, it encourages people to invest and gives rewards for spending.

im really enjoying the game that "Thomas Frede" said was the "worst game ever!". ok first off. bro, what games are you playing that THIS is the worst ever, I need to get on your level! yes this game gets difficult after a while, like most games! unless youre looking for mindless screen tapping, this is fun, and by putting thought into it, you can do interesting things with tower placement. **4 stars cause you HAVE to have GOOD cell service to play.

This is a very fun game and I really do enjoy it. the only issue I have is like most games nowadays, there are lots of money grab tactics used. So many things to purchase and it feels like you can't really get ahead without spending money.

Okay now this game is fun and very enjoyable it is very difficult at times to pass a levels but here lately the game keeps Failing to load and Kix me out I have to uninstall the game reinstall it let it do all the download stuff again and then I can play for a while but then after a while whenever I quit whenever I go back in to do it it Kix me out again can you please fix this it's very annoying

I really enjoy this game it's a great way to kill some time. over the past 2 days I have had trouble logging in, and it's getting annoying. Please fix the bug soon so I can continue to enjoy the game.

Almost 5 stars. Requires constant connection to play. Even momentary drop-outs render the game unresponsive which can lead to unsatisfactory play. This is the first time I have seen this phenomena in an Android game.
a very very well made enjoyable tower defense game that has the most predatory ads and pay structure known too man, I still play it and hate myself for it cause of there ad/pay structure.

been trying so many TD style games and this one is the best TD I've ever played in mobile. best thing is no forced ads, you can watch it only if you decided to the reason why 4 star is because the game keep lagging and sometimes disconnected even though i have full bar internet signal please fix that and i will change into 5 stars

star_5.text: Finally, FINALLY a mobile game without timers for when you're actually allowed to play it. Yes, it has micro transactions. Yes, it has ads, but they aren't forced. but crucially, you can just play any time you want. the bar is so low, but this game clears it and is actually fun, to boot. It feels way less manipulative than some of the other mobile games I've played(and uninstalled). Thank you, Panteon. You dun good with this one.

I enjoy playing this game. I play it whether I can. The difficulty is frustrating at times, but it makes you play it more to build up your towers. The only problem I have, is when the side games say they start on the calendar but you still have 1-2 days until you can play them, and it is only for like 3 days. Need more time. How about longer levels as well, like an unlimited level to see how far your can go?

Edited to add: I've been playing for weeks, and have NEVER once had the game crash on me, despite most of my play time being with very little cell service and no wifi. Fun game, no bs energy needed to start a round either! Devs seem to be working on it all the time, too. Give it a try, it is a fun tower defense style.

it starts off a bit slow but it starts going sometimes you don't get the weaponry you want when you need it and it takes a few waves to get what you want but other than that I mean it's still a fun game passes time pretty quickly and just something simple to play. Maybe add some new weaponry, I ain't really much you need to do to make this any better.

Can't get any more recent than 2026? I've never experienced what the previous reviews have said happened or reasons to dislike the game. I had an issue and contacted RR, and they effectively communicated with me throughout the whole issue and fixed it within a very short time. this game is awesome. It is a lot of fun, very challenging, and always changing events, lots to keep up with. if you have an issue, address it and watch the magic unfold;)

The most genius thing that I found about this game is that you can customise the path of the attack , this is the first time I saw this and it is very amazing , of course the progress is slow and the game get harder and harder as you progress , but the meaning of game isnt else . what is the point of very fadt progress ? the fun is to struggle and try again over and over to win . in my opinion this is one of the best TD game ever .

horrible servers, I'm on home wifi (standing right next to router) and I have mobile data running (my carrier is verizon) and still I can't connect to your servers all of a sudden...terrible. EDIT 01/22/26: i'm not exactly sure why that was happening, the problem fixed itself though. game is otherwise fun and challenging in particular areas. thanks for responding as well.

In my opinion tbis game is so far the best of its genre that I can find. That being said, I do however think they need a monthly vip or permanent no ads option thats not so damn spendy. i cant afford it most months and i absolutely hate ads. ive uninstalled this game manytimes but i just like it and really hop they learn to not be greedy

Only deserves one star because purchases are a total rip off and rewards are pitiful! If one star represents the true cost of an item. Im giving it 5 stars anyway its my review and I want most stars possible! Latest game update! Purchases now give more bang for your buck! even 5 year olds know $20=20000 gems not 1200 Its a Win/win Now More people will make purchases and enjoy the game. 'what a stupid oversight' bug fixed 'exposure to ignorant offensive get rich ' bug fixed

very fun game and easy to play it guides you step by step into using all your tools for playing the game very user friendly I love strategy games like this one not only an amazing way to pass the time but you also can earn money. I highly recommend it.
Great game, the only thing letting it down currently is that whenever an ad takes me through to Google play store it causes the game to restart, which means it doesn't count.

you guys owe me thousands of gems and replays for watching your stupid ads that reset the game without a reward.. i haven't said anything but its time to pay up. so sick of ads restarting the game and you gotta wait a few minutes for the damn thing to load up again

It's been fun so far. I wish it had a 2 or 3x speed up for rounds you know you're gonna win. No annoying pop-up ads, no ads at the end and beginning of each round. Worth it if you're bored and need something to do.

I really Love this game. The only thing I don't like is that if you don't drop money into the game it seams like you can't really progress in the game. But everything else is awesome. Great graphics, great campaign, and really cool weapons.
This game keeps me busy for hours. Great defense tower game. My only request is, can you make it to I can choose any tower per round? That would be awesome! Otherwise let's play!!!!!
good strategy game. im really enjoying. Ads are minimal. i will be keeping this game for sure! im hooked!
I was skeptical at first but after several months of playing I found this game very very relaxing but yet enough difficulty to plan out your strategy and placements of towers and skills 😎
Love tower defence games and this one keeps it fresh with choices how to play out each level, only played a couple of levels but I can see me sinking some decent time into this one!
Brilliant game with hours of fun. plenty of freebies if you're willing to watch a few adverts. No need to spend money to enjoy the game.
I really enjoy this game especially the unlimited level however my game is saying my data is corrupted and won't let me enter after kicking me out several times this wasn't an issue before the update
